page.title: Match products to packaging
page.subtitle: Tell us which primary packaging holds each product. Without this we can't compute EPR weight per order.

no_inventory_banner.title: Set up your packaging inventory first
no_inventory_banner.body: Before matching products you need at least one packaging in your inventory.

empty_state.all_mapped_body: Nice work — every product in your catalog has at least one packaging assigned.
empty_state.no_products_body: Sync your Shopify catalog to start matching packaging.

purposes.LABEL: Label
purposes.CONTAINER_hint: The packaging that holds the product (box, mailer)
purposes.SEAL_hint: Seal or tape that closes the packaging

form.quantity_help: How many units of this packaging are needed for one product.
form.apply_to_groups_hint_single: This product belongs to a group. You can apply the packaging to the other products in the group too:
form.apply_to_groups_hint_multi: This product belongs to several groups. You can apply the packaging to the other products in those groups:
form.apply_to_group_checkbox: Apply to every product in group "{{group}}"

form.overwrite_label: Replace existing packaging with the same role
form.overwrite_help: If on, we'll remove the group's packaging that plays the same role before applying the new one.

bulk_selection.title: Apply packaging to {{count}} selected products
bulk_selection.info_banner: We'll add this packaging to {{count}} products. Existing matches won't be touched.

delete.title: Remove match
delete.body: Do you really want to remove the match with {{name}}? The product won't carry this packaging in your EPR calculations anymore.

toasts.sync_started: Sync started. Give it a few seconds.
toasts.mapping_add_to_groups: Packaging applied to the selected groups.
toasts.bulk_group_applied: Packaging applied to every product in the group.
toasts.bulk_group_failed: We couldn't apply packaging to the group.
toasts.bulk_confirm_no_pending: The selected products have no suggestions to confirm.

page.title: Product groups
page.subtitle: Create groups to apply shipping rules and packaging matches to several products in one shot.

groups.info_banner: Choose how to populate the group: Shopify product type creates one group per product_type. Tag groups by product tag. Manual selection lets you hand-pick products.

empty_state.body: Groups let you apply packaging and shipping rules to many products at once. Create your first group to get started.

card.no_rules: No shipping rule uses this group yet.

form.match_value_help_product_type: Must match the "Product Type" field on Shopify exactly.
form.match_value_help_tag: Must match a Shopify product tag exactly.

delete_modal.title: Delete group?
delete_modal.body: Do you really want to delete the group {{name}}?
delete_modal.rules_warning: This group is used by {{count}} shipping rules. Deleting it will turn those rules into catch-alls (applied to every product).
delete_modal.rules_warning_one: This group is used by 1 shipping rule. Deleting it will turn it into a catch-all.

toasts.sync_done: Product types imported from your Shopify catalog.
